items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes after two US soldiers killed in Jordan
items.dek: US forces target Iranian sites for the eighth night in a row, while Iran says it fired drones at the US military in Kuwait.
items.body: US forces target Iranian sites for the eighth night in a row, while Iran says it fired drones at the US military in Kuwait.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Andrew Tate and brother arrested in US after more charges laid against them in UK
items.dek: The Crown Prosecution Service says it has requested their extradition from the US, while their lawyer says they are "innocent".
items.body: The Crown Prosecution Service says it has requested their extradition from the US, while their lawyer says they are "innocent".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: New EU border system tripling time at passport control, airport boss says
items.dek: Ryanair has also warned passengers travelling to Europe this summer to prepare for extended waits.
items.body: Ryanair has also warned passengers travelling to Europe this summer to prepare for extended waits.
items.author: IriLine Desk
